items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Commission rules by product/service/category', but there is no direct evidence provided that addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for commission rules, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to these rules. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive status.
